'''Harrak''' was an officer who served in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]] as a [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]]. During his military career, he would also serve as an adviser to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]]. He was suspicious of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and viewed any request of military help from them a trap.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}}
